_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Engage and collaborate with allies and partners to advance shared strategic AI objectives.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to align diverse stakeholder interests around a shared data and AI vision, building coalitions that sustain transformation momentum through organizational changes and competing priorities.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI LS domain. LS-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-S-013 (LS, cosine: 0.594), DG-T-002 (DG, cosine: 0.556).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 7.0/10 (raw 0.701). Shared vocabulary: [ai, shared]. DCWF-only terms [advance, allies, collaborate, engage, objectives, partners] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, align, around, building, changes, coalitions] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.883 (P=0.896, R=0.870). P exceeds R by 0.026 — the DCWF element's 13 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.5%). "Engage and collaborate with allies and partners to advance shared strategic AI o" and "Ability to align diverse stakeholder interests around a shared data and AI visio" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.622 < STS 0.701 (gap -0.079). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [advance, allies, collaborate] and [ability, align, around] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.5%. Shared tokens: [ai, shared]. DCWF-only: [advance, allies, collaborate, engage, objectives, partners]. WIDAI-only: [ability, align, around, building, changes, coalitions].
